notes: Accepted as an infrared-sounder ancillary dataset rather than an imagery/geophysical product. The EUMETSAT API states that the noise covariance matrix provides measurement precision and channel-error correlations for IASI, and the file series supports use of IASI infrared spectra/FDRs. The instrument noise covariance matrix (NCM) is an important characteristic of the instrument as it provides the precision of the measurements, as well as the correlation between the error on the different channels. The noise covariance matrix file consists in a series of binary records. The matrices are used in data assimilation and numerical weather prediction.
desc_zh: EUMETSAT IASI Noise Covariance Matrix - Metop 是面向 Metop IASI 红外大气探测干涉仪的仪器噪声协方差矩阵辅助数据集。官方说明该矩阵描述测量精度以及不同通道误差之间的相关性，可用于 IASI 红外光谱、主成分压缩数据和反演算法的不确定度建模与质量控制；它是辅助/校准类数据，而非普通影像或地球物理栅格产品。
desc_en: EUMETSAT IASI Noise Covariance Matrix - Metop is an instrument-noise covariance ancillary dataset for the Metop Infrared Atmospheric Sounding Interferometer. The official metadata states that the matrix characterizes measurement precision and error correlations between channels, supporting uncertainty modelling and quality control for IASI infrared spectra, principal-component products and retrieval algorithms; it is an ancillary calibration dataset rather than a conventional image or geophysical grid product.

The TES algorithm is combined with an improved Water Vapor Scaling (WVS) atmospheric correction scheme to stabilize

notes: ECOSTRESS ECO_L2G_LSTE v003 provides atmospherically corrected land surface temperature and emissivity from thermal radiometer observations, gridded at 70 m. CMR summary: The ECOsystem Spaceborne Thermal Radiometer Experiment on Space Station (ECOSTRESS) mission measures the temperature of plants to better understand how much water plants need and how they respond to stress. ECOSTRESS is attached to the International Space Station (ISS) and collects data globally between 52° N and 52° S latitudes.  The ECOSTRESS Gridded Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity Instantaneous Level 2 Global 70 m (ECO_L2G_LSTE) Version 3 data product provides atmospherically corrected land surface temperature and emissivity (LST&E) values derived from the five thermal infrared (TIR) bands using the Temperature-Emissivity Separation (TES) algorithm. In addition, a Sea Surface Temperature (SST) variable is included that is valid over all water surfaces (ocean and inland water). The Level 2 LST&E and SST algorithms run on all pixels regardless of land, ocean, or cloud. This data product is projected to a globally snapped 0.0006
desc_zh: ECOSTRESS Gridded Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity Instantaneous L2 Global 70 m V003 是 ECOSTRESS 第 3 版 70 m 陆表温度与发射率产品。ECOSTRESS 搭载在国际空间站上，观测约 52°N 至 52°S 范围内的植物和地表热状态，该产品提供大气校正后的热红外 LST&E，可用于蒸散、水分胁迫、城市热环境和精细尺度地表能量研究。
desc_en: ECOSTRESS Gridded Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity Instantaneous L2 Global 70 m V003 is a Version 3 ECOSTRESS 70 m land surface temperature and emissivity product. ECOSTRESS operates from the International Space Station and observes land-surface thermal conditions between about 52°N and 52°S; this product provides atmospherically corrected thermal infrared LST&E for evapotranspiration, water-stress, urban-thermal and fine-scale surface-energy studies.

CMR summary: The NOAA-21 Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite (VIIRS) Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity (LST&E) Version 2 swath product (VJ221) is produced daily in 6-minute temporal increments of satellite acquisition. The VJ221 product uses a physics-based algorithm to dynamically retrieve both the LST and emissivity simultaneously for VIIRS thermal infrared bands M14 (8.55 µm), M15 (10.76 µm), and M16 (12 µm) at a spatial resolution of 750 meters.  The VJ221 product is developed synergistically with the Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer (MODIS) LST&E Version 6.1 product ([MOD21](https://doi.org/10.5067/MODIS/MOD21.061)) using the same input atmospheric products and algorithmic approach based on the ASTER Temperature Emissivity Separation (TES) technique. CMR summary: The NASA/NOAA Suomi National Polar-orbiting Partnership (Suomi NPP) Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite (VIIRS) Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity (LST&E) Night Version 2 product (VNP21A1N) is compiled daily from nighttime Level 2 Gridded (L2G) intermediate products.   The L2G process maps the daily [VNP21](https://doi.org/10.5067/VIIRS/VNP21.002) swath granules onto a sinusoidal MODIS grid and stores all observations overlapping a gridded cell for a given night. The VNP21A1 algorithm sorts through all these observations for each cell and estimates the final LST value as an average from all cloud-free observations that have good LST accuracies. The nighttime average is weighted by the observation coverage for that cell. Only observations having observation coverage more than a certain threshold (15%) are considered for this averaging. The 1 kilometer dataset is derived through resampling the native 750 meter VIIRS resolution

desc_en: VIIRS/NPP Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid Night V002 is a NASA LP DAAC Suomi NPP VIIRS land surface temperature and emissivity product distributed as a daily nighttime 1 km sinusoidal-grid collection. CMR summary: The NOAA-20 Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite (VIIRS) Land Surface Temperature and Emissivity (LST&E) Climate Modeling Grid Version 2 product (VJ121C) is compiled daily from daytime Level 2 Gridded (L2G) intermediate products. The L2G process maps the daily [VJ121](https://doi.org/10.5067/VIIRS/VJ121.002) swath granules onto a sinusoidal MODIS grid and stores all observations overlapping a gridded cell for a given day. The VJ121C1 algorithm sorts through all these observations for each cell and estimates the final LST value as an average from all cloud-free observations that have good LST accuracies. The 0.05 degree (5,600 m) dataset is derived through resampling the native 750 meter VIIRS resolution in the input product. desc_zh: IASI Level 1 Principal Component Scores 是 EUMETSAT 面向 Metop IASI 全球观测发布的红外高光谱辐射压缩产品。它用主成分分析将 IASI 辐射光谱表示为较少的 score 系数，可用于噪声降低光谱重建、资料同化预处理、检索算法和高光谱红外数据压缩研究。
desc_en: IASI Level 1 Principal Component Scores is an EUMETSAT operational product for global Metop IASI hyperspectral infrared observations. It compresses IASI radiance spectra into principal-component score coefficients, supporting noise-reduced spectral reconstruction, assimilation preprocessing, retrieval development and hyperspectral infrared data-compression studies.

EUMETSAT PWLR documentation states that EARS-IASI L2 contains temperature and humidity profiles derived from IASI, AMSU-A and MHS measurements from Metop-A and Metop-B, generated with the PWLR3 algorithm, distributed in HDF5, and targeted at better than 30-minute timeliness for 95 percent of data. The Data Store browse API returned 404 for this regional service, so the row uses the User Portal landing page as the canonical URL and keeps API failure evidence in the phase note.
desc_zh: IASI Level 2 温湿廓线 Metop 区域服务是 EUMETSAT EARS-IASI 的近实时红外大气探测产品。它利用 Metop-A/B 上的 IASI、AMSU-A 和 MHS 观测，通过 PWLR3 方法生成温度和湿度廓线，面向区域临近预报、资料同化和强天气环境监测等需要低时延廓线资料的应用。
desc_en: IASI Level 2 Temperature and Humidity Profiles for the Metop regional data service is an EUMETSAT EARS-IASI near-real-time atmospheric sounding product. It derives temperature and humidity profiles from Metop IASI, AMSU-A and MHS observations using the PWLR3 approach, supporting regional nowcasting, data assimilation and severe-weather environment monitoring where low latency profiles are needed.

desc_en: HCMM was an early NASA Heat Capacity Mapping Mission using visible/near-infrared and 10.5-12.5 micrometer thermal infrared channels to observe day and night surface thermal conditions. The USGS data release provides about 2,400 recovered TIFF digital-source scenes over regions including the United States, western Canada, western Europe, northern Africa and eastern Australia for historical land thermal studies.

CMR abstract: WARNING: To users of the derived product “co_mmr_midtrop” (carbon monoxide mass mixing ratio to dry air [kg/kg] at ~500 hPa). This variable has a significant bias due to a conversion error: the molecular weight of carbon dioxide (CO2, 44.01 g/mol) was used instead of carbon monoxide (CO, 28.01 g/mol). To correct, simply multiply “co_mmr_midtrop” by 28.01/44.01. Alternatively, derive a profile of mass mixing ratio from scratch using the retrieved column density values (“mol_lay/co_mol_lay”) in the Level 2 files. For further questions or concerns please contact the Sounder SIPS at: sounder.sips@jpl.nasa.gov  The CL

It differs from existing MSG DSLF/DIDSLF rows, which are Meteosat Second Generation LSA SAF longwave flux products, and from MTG FCI OLR at TOA, which is top-of-atmosphere outgoing longwave radiation. Official EUMETSAT search identifies EO:EUM:DAT:0692 as DLI combined with SSI with acronyms MET DLI, MET SSI, OSI-303-b and OSI-304-b. OSI SAF CDOP4 requirement/specification documents describe OSI-303-b as Meteosat 0 degree Downward Longwave Irradiance using MTG/FCI input, hourly and daily generation, NetCDF dissemination through FTP server, EUMETCast and EDC, and 0.05 degree lat-lon coverage over East Atlantic and West Indian domains.
desc_zh: EUMETSAT OSI SAF MTG DLI/SSI 产品面向 Meteosat 0 度区域，提供基于 MTG/FCI 的地表向下长波辐照度，并与地表太阳辐照度产品成组发布。OSI SAF 规范将 OSI-303-b 描述为使用 MTG/FCI 输入的近实时产品，包含小时和日尺度 NetCDF 数据，可用于海气相互作用、海洋模式和地表能量收支研究。
desc_en: The EUMETSAT OSI SAF MTG DLI/SSI product family provides surface downward longwave irradiance over the Meteosat 0-degree region from MTG/FCI inputs, packaged together with surface solar irradiance. OSI SAF specifications describe OSI-303-b as a near-real-time MTG/FCI product with hourly and daily NetCDF outputs for air-sea interaction, ocean modelling and surface energy-budget studies.

EUMETSAT news on new OSI SAF MTG products names Meteosat Downward Longwave Irradiance OSI-303-b. OSI SAF CDOP4 PRD specifies OSI-303-b with MTG/FCI input, hourly and daily generation, NetCDF dissemination, and 0.05 degree coverage. OSI SAF MTG radiative fluxes ATBD defines DLI as irradiance reaching Earth surface in the 4-100 micrometer band.

Summary excerpt: The Meteosat Second Generation (MSG-3) satellites  are spin stabilized geostationary satellites operated by the European Organization for the Exploitation of Meteorological Satellites (EUMETSAT) to provide accurate weather monitoring data through its primary instrument the Spinning Enhanced Visible and InfraRed Imager (SEVIRI), which has the capacity to observe the Earth in 12 spectral channels. desc_zh: FY-4B AGRI 云顶高度 CTH 全圆盘 L2 产品由国家卫星气象中心发布，提供 4 km NetCDF 格式的地球静止卫星云顶高度资料。NSMC product-info API 显示该产品为 FY4B/AGRI/DISK/L2/CTH 标称投影，利用 AGRI 红外窗区通道和 CO2 吸收通道并结合数值预报资料反演云顶高度，可服务短时天气预报、气候预测和云辐射强迫研究。
desc_en: The FY-4B AGRI Cloud Top Height Full Disk L2 product is an official NSMC geostationary infrared cloud-property dataset in 4 km NetCDF format. The NSMC product-info API identifies it as a FY4B/AGRI/DISK/L2/CTH nominal-projection product using AGRI infrared window channels and a CO2 absorption channel with numerical prediction data to retrieve cloud-top height for forecasting, climate prediction and cloud-radiative-forcing studies.
